zh.lifeSummary: 當Afonso II 'O Gordo' Sanches 3rd King of Portugal於1185年4月23日出生在葡萄牙可布拉可布拉時，他的父親Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal30歲，母親Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort33歲。他於1205年與Urraca Alfonso de Castilla Y Plantagenet Rainha de Portugal在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多托萊多結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1211年在葡萄牙被列為rei de portugal - 3º。他去世於1223年3月25日在他的家鄉享年37歲，埋葬在葡萄牙萊里亞阿爾可巴薩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Afonso II 'O Gordo' Sanches 3rd King of Portugal于1185年4月23日出生在葡萄牙可布拉可布拉时，他的父亲Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal30岁，母亲Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort33岁。他于1205年与Urraca Alfonso de Castilla Y Plantagenet Rainha de Portugal在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多托萊多结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1211年在葡萄牙被列为rei de portugal - 3º。他去世于1223年3月25日在他的家乡享年37岁，埋葬在葡萄牙萊里亞阿爾可巴薩。

nameMeanings.name: Sanches
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Manuel, Juan, Jesus, Luis, Pedro, Adolfo, Alina, Arturo, Domingos, Guillermo.  Portuguese Joao, Amadeu, Marcio.
Portuguese: patronymic from the personal name   Sancho  .
Spanish: variant or altered form of Sánchez (see Sanchez ).

variants.name: Sancho
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Elena, Carlos, Fernando, Jacinto, Mario, Agustin, Ana, Dulce, Emilio, Enrique, Eugenio.

Spanish and Portuguese: from Sancho, a popular medieval personal name, which is probably from Latin Sanc(t)ius, a derivative of sanctus ‘holy’. The personal name was borne by a 9th-century Christian martyr of Cordova.

nameMeanings.name: Afonso
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Alfonso
meanings: Visigothic: probably a compound of adal ‘noble’ + funs ‘ready’; a traditional royal name.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: 'O
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

variants.name: Oh
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Gordo'
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the Scottish surname, which is derived from a place name. It is a matter of dispute whether it referred originally to the Gordon in Berwickshire or to a similarly named place in Normandy. As a given name it seems to have been taken up in honour of  Charles George Gordon  (  1833–85 ), the British general who died at Khartoum.

en.lifeSummary: When Afonso II 'O Gordo' Sanches 3rd King of Portugal was born on 23 April 1185, in Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal, his father, Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal, was 30 and his mother, Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort, was 33. He married Urraca Alfonso de Castilla Y Plantagenet Rainha de Portugal in 1205, in Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. In 1211, his occupation is listed as rei de portugal - 3º in Portugal. He died on 25 March 1223, in his hometown, at the age of 37, and was buried in Alcobaça, Leiria, Portugal.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Afonso II 'O Gordo' Sanches 3rd King of Portugal est né le 23 avril 1185, à Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal, son père, Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Urraca Alfonso de Castilla Y Plantagenet Rainha de Portugal en 1205, à Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. En 1211, sa profession de son indiquée est rei de portugal - 3º à Portugal. Il est décédé le 25 mars 1223, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Alcobaça, Leiria, Portugal.

de.lifeSummary: Als Afonso II 'O Gordo' Sanches 3rd King of Portugal am 23. April 1185 in Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal 30 und seine Mutter Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort 33. Er hat 1205 in Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien Urraca Alfonso de Castilla Y Plantagenet Rainha de Portugal geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1211 ist sein Beruf als rei de portugal - 3º in Portugal aufgeführt. Er starb am 25. März 1223 im Alter von 37 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Alcobaça, Leiria, Portugal begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Afonso II 'O Gordo' Sanches 3rd King of Portugal è nato il il 23 aprile 1185 nel Coimbra, Coimbra, Portogallo, il suo padre, Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Urraca Alfonso de Castilla Y Plantagenet Rainha de Portugal nel 1205, nel Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1211, la sua occupazione è indicata come rei de portugal - 3º nel Portogallo. Morì il 25 marzo 1223, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a Alcobaça, Leiria, Portogallo.

ja.lifeSummary: Afonso II 'O Gordo' Sanches 3rd King of Portugalが1185年4月23日にポルトガルコインブラコインブラで生まれた時，父Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugalは30歳，母Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consortは33歳であった。1205年にスペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャトーレドトーレドでUrraca Alfonso de Castilla Y Plantagenet Rainha de Portugalと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1211年，ポルトガルでの職業はrei de portugal - 3ºと記録されている。彼は1223年3月25日に故郷で37歳で死去し，ポルトガルレアイリアアルコバcアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Afonso II 'O Gordo' Sanches 3rd King of Portugal(이)가 1185년 4월 23일 포르투갈 코임브라 코임브라에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1205년 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 톨도 톨도에서 Urraca Alfonso de Castilla Y Plantagenet Rainha de Portugal(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1211년, 그의 직업은 포르투갈에서 rei de portugal - 3º이었다. 그는 1223년 3월 25일 그의 고향에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 포르투갈 레이리아 알컵아c아에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Afonso II 'O Gordo' Sanches 3rd King of Portugal nasceu em 23 de abril de 1185, em Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal, seu pai, Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Urraca Alfonso de Castilla Y Plantagenet Rainha de Portugal em 1205, em Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1211, sua profissão aparece como rei de portugal - 3º em Portugal. Ele faleceu em 25 de março de 1223, em sua cidade natal, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Alcobaça, Leiria, Portugal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Afonso II 'O Gordo' Sanches 3rd King of Portugal родился 23 апреля 1185 г. в местности коимбра, коимбра, Португалия, его отцу по имени Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Urraca Alfonso de Castilla Y Plantagenet Rainha de Portugal в 1205 г. в местности толедо, толедо, кастилла-ла манча, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. В 1211 году он работал по профессии rei de portugal - 3º в местности Португалия. Он умер 25 марта 1223 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности алкобаcа, лиря, Португалия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Afonso II 'O Gordo' Sanches 3rd King of Portugal nació el 23 de abril de 1185, en Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal, su papá, Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Urraca Alfonso de Castilla Y Plantagenet Rainha de Portugal en 1205, en Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1211, su ocupación registrada era rei de portugal - 3º en Portugal. Murió el 25 de marzo de 1223, en su pueblo, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en Alcobaça, Leiria, Portugal.
